Amended Notice Of Motion For Discovery Of Police Officer Personnel Records Pursuant To Evidence Code 1043
Off Calendar Nov-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexander Gourse, Esq. of Rosen Bien Galvan & Grunfeld LLP for Plaintiff.
James Hannawalt, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court asks re: the remaining issues and its inclination to Deny the matter without prejudice. Plaintiff argues vagueness, complaints. Defendant addresses the Court's concerns, proposes to produce complaints, witness list, findings in relation to use of force, detention and dishonesty. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) Scheduling is discussed off the record. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF OLIVER BARCENAS, SOFIA BARCENAS'S Motion For Discovery Of Police Officer Personnel Records Pursuant To Evidence Code 1043.

The Plaintiff's motion is Denied without Prejudice to require the City to produce any additional documents. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Deputy City Attorney to prepare a proposed order which include the agreements, the City's reaffirmed offers to produce documents and information in the categories described as fully stated on the record in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Amended Notice Of Motion For Discovery Of Police Officer Personnel Records Pursuant To Evidence Code 1043
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Nov-12-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Amended Notice Of Motion For Discovery Of Police Officer Personnel Records Pursuant To Evidence Code 1043
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Attorneys ALEXANDER GOURSE, ESQ. and JESSICA WINTER, ESQ. of Rosen Bien Galvan & Grunfeld LLP (Tel: 415-433-6830) appearing for plaintiffs;
Deputy City Attorneys JAMES F. HANNAWALT and SABRINA BERDUX COHEN of the Office of the City Attorney of the City and County of San Francisco (Tel: 415-554-3800) appearing for defendants City and County of San Francisco and Joshua Cabillo.

Hearing Re: Motion For Discovery Of Police Officer Personnel Records Pursuant To Evidence Code 1043.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. The Court informs the parties that its pending ruling on defendants' motion for judgment on the pleadings may affect the court's analysis of the scope of discovery in this case depending on whether or not the negligent hiring and supervision claim remains. The Court and counsel agree to the following briefing and hearing schedule: The Court continues the hearing on plaintiffs' Motion For Discovery Of Police Officer Personnel Records Pursuant To Evidence Code 1043 to November 12, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. The Court orders the parties in the interim to continue to meet and confer regarding the underlying discovery dispute. Supplemental briefing by each side is due by November 5, 2019 limited to five pages per side and which is to address any progress made by the parties, which issues remain for decision on November 12th, and how the court's legal decision affects the motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
